method: Remove consultation influence and inspect whether baseline artifacts already pointed to the same evidence and search path.

summary.hostile_finding: No consult-only contradiction earns CONSULT_REQUIRED under hostile replay. Three were effectively inevitable from baseline files.

items.reason: Baseline PCR-003 already named vascular pathology as therapy-relevant and listed most ARIA/CAA sources used later.
Baseline PCR-004 explicitly named blood biomarker progress as deployment-contested and listed the core sources.
BCL-MIXED-PATHOLOGY and PCR-002 already contained LATE/PART/mixed pathology sources and the 'recognized but underweighted' hypothesis status.

items.original_counterfactual_claim: not separately claimed as consult-only in premature_convergence_report, but listed in contradiction_recovery_report
items.reason: The baseline already used a multifactorial uncertainty boundary and had all major mechanism clusters. Later phrasing required synthesis, not consultation.
